hypothesis: In Corral’s Spectra and MD environments, rewriting tool names and docstrings with LLM-generated paraphrases that maximize cosine embedding similarity to the task prompt—without altering tool signatures or functionality—will increase pass@5 by at least 15 percentage points relative to the original descriptions for both Claude-3.5 Sonnet and GPT-4o under both ReAct and tool-calling scaffolds.
